arts.ttl: Coventry City payday edges closer as Viktor Gyokeres 'commences talks' ahead of transfer window
arts.sum: And while that will come as a major boost for all of the Sweden international’s admirers – the likes of Arsenal and Manchester United will be relieved to hear the figure is substantially less than his reported £83.6m release clause – it’s not such great news for Coventry, who have a 10 percent sell-on clause and are set to gain financially from any profit on the initial fee they sold the 26-year-old for back in the summer of 2023 (around £20m including bonuses). arts.ttl: Frank Lampard provides 'disappointing' injury update on Coventry City goalkeeper Oliver Dovin
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has provided a hugely disappointing injury update on Oliver Dovin, revealing that the first choice Coventry City goalkeeper has suffered an anterior cruciate knee ligament rupture (ACL), which means the player will require surgery and a lengthy spell on the sidelines. Paying tribute to Dovin's progress as a player in the short time he's been with the Sky Blues, he said: “He’s had an incredible season, personally, the strides he’s taken since we’ve been here, making the Sweden squad makes it even slightly more bitter in a funny way because he’s doing so well.
